settings.text: Stride Skin is designed for active people whose skin is constantly exposed to sweat, sun, friction, and frequent cleansing; conditions that make skin more sensitive and reactive than average. Traditional “strong” treatments can easily overwhelm active skin, leading to irritation, dryness, and setbacks. Stride Skin takes a different approach with an effective but low irritation system that works with the skin, not against it. By focusing on smart exfoliation, barrier support, and recovery, the Stride Skin system delivers visible results while respecting the heightened sensitivity of skin that moves, trains, and performs every day.

settings.heading: How to Make It Work for You

settings.text:
Stride Skin is built to fit real routines, not rigid rules. Start with the basics and build from there. Cleanse consistently to remove sweat, oil, and environmental buildup that can trigger sensitivity. Treat targeted concerns with focused formulas that address tone, texture, or recovery without overwhelming active skin. Finish with hydration to support the skin barrier and help skin bounce back after exposure and training.

Stride Skin works best when used as a system Reset, Repair, Recover but every product is thoughtfully formulated to deliver results on its own, whether you’re simplifying your routine or leveling it up.

settings.heading: RESET
settings.text:
Clear the Surface
Sweat, oil, sunscreen, and environmental buildup sit on the skin and interfere with performance.

Cleanse without stripping
Gently exfoliate buildup
Prepare skin to absorb treatments

Clear skin works better.

settings.heading: REPAIR
settings.text:
Correct Visible Stress

Sun exposure and friction can lead to uneven tone, dark spots, and dullness.
Support brighter, more even-looking skin
Target visible discoloration
Encourage skin renewal without harsh irritation

Correction should never compromise comfort.

settings.heading: RECOVER
settings.text:
Restore Balance

After cleansing and treatment, skin needs hydration and support.
Restore moisture
Support barrier function
Help skin feel comfortable and resilient

Recovery is where skin resets for the next day.

settings.title: Kojic Acid
settings.text: Helps improve the appearance of dark spots
